description_long: This mobile phone features a rectangular body with a predominantly black and gray color scheme, accented by a large circular red and yellow button on its back. The front face is relatively plain, with a cylindrical protrusion at the top, possibly representing a speaker or antenna. The back panel is detailed with a central circular emblem, flanked by metallic-looking components and a green rectangular section, suggesting a display or indicator. The sides are angular and robust, with visible seams and a protruding cylindrical element at the bottom, likely a connector or antenna. The overall design is utilitarian, with pronounced buttons and mechanical details, evoking a rugged, possibly retro-futuristic style.
description: A rugged, rectangular mobile phone with a black and gray body, featuring a large red and yellow circular button and metallic details on the back.
description_view_0: The top view highlights the cylindrical protrusion and the blocky, angular structure of the phone's upper section.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the phone's thickness, the raised circular button, and the layered construction of the body.
description_view_2: The back view showcases the prominent red and yellow circular button, metallic details, and a green rectangular section, with a cylindrical connector at the bottom.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the protruding cylindrical connector and the phone's robust, multi-layered build.
attribute_screen_display_content: No visible content; the screen area appears blank or turned off.
attribute_camera_placement: A single circular camera or sensor module is located at the top right corner on the back, protruding outward.
attribute_button_layout: One large circular button is centered on the back, colored red and yellow; no other physical buttons are visible.
